𝗠𝗫𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞 | Scanning and assessing the security and configuration of email servers.  🌟 Rising Fast!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Scanning and assessing the security and configuration of email servers.
📅 Created: Sep 2018 • Updated: Mar 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ DNS record checks (A, MX, PTR, SPF, MTA-STS, DKIM, DMARC)
✅ StartTLS and certificate validation
✅ Open port scanning (25, 465, 587)
✅ Blacklist status checking
✅ Information leakage detection (server string, VRFY command)
✅ SMTPSmuggling vulnerability scanning
✅ Open relay detection
✅ Customizable mailFrom, mailTo, and DNS server
✅ TSV report generation
✅ DKIM selector check


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 99 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 13 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

mxcheck is a Go-based scanner for e-mail servers, providing comprehensive checks on DNS records, security protocols, open ports, blacklist status, and potential vulnerabilities like open relays and SMTPSmuggling. It allows for customizable sender/receiver addresses and outputs reports in TSV format.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/steffenfritz/mxcheck

𝗙𝗥𝗔𝗠𝗘 | A user-friendly desktop application for converting and transcoding video and audio files with advanced options and AI upscaling.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Svelte 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A user-friendly desktop application for converting and transcoding video and audio files with advanced options and AI upscaling.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Support for various media containers (mp4, mkv, webm, etc.)
✅ Multiple video and audio encoders (H.264, H.265, VP9, AV1, AAC, Opus, etc.)
✅ Hardware acceleration support (Apple, NVIDIA)
✅ Bitrate control (CRF, Target Bitrate)
✅ Metadata probing via ffprobe
✅ AI upscaling with Real-ESRGAN
✅ Concurrent processing with Rust backend
✅ Native GUI built with Tauri and Svelte


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🍴 28 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Frame is a high-performance media conversion utility that provides a native graphical interface for FFmpeg operations. It allows users to control transcoding parameters, leverage hardware acceleration, and even perform AI upscaling, all managed by a Rust backend and a Svelte frontend.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Recording terminal sessions to create animated GIFs or web player links for demonstrations, tutorials, or sharing command-line workflows.

✅ Record terminal sessions
✅ Generate animated GIF images
✅ Shareable web player links
✅ Highly customizable recording and output

✅ Customizable window frames, fonts, and colors
✅ Edit frames and adjust delays
✅ Skip frames for reduced file size
✅ Render images with text for better quality

Terminalizer is a command-line tool that records terminal sessions and generates animated GIF files or shareable web player links. It offers extensive customization for recording parameters, output styles, and terminal themes, making it ideal for creating demonstrations and tutorials.

𝗚𝗢𝗦𝗨𝗞𝗜 | To provide a unified, private, and synchronized bookmark management solution across various browsers and devices without relying on cloud services or browser extensions.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified, private, and synchronized bookmark management solution across various browsers and devices without relying on cloud services or browser extensions.
📅 Created: Oct 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Extension-free bookmark management
✅ Multi-browser and multi-profile support
✅ Real-time synchronization (local or P2P)
✅ Portable database
✅ Cloudless and privacy-first design
✅ Optional archiving
✅ Single binary deployment
✅ Web UI


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🍴 24 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GoSuki is a privacy-focused, extension-free bookmark manager written in Go. It unifies bookmarks across multiple browsers and profiles, offering real-time local or P2P synchronization with a portable database and optional archiving capabilities.

✅ Orchestrates AI coding agents into workflows
✅ Enables repeatable, long-running workflows
✅ Supports multi-agent orchestration and communication
✅ Allows for parallel execution of agents
✅ Handles workflow persistence for long-running tasks
✅ Provides context engineering for agent prompts and data

CodeMachine-CLI is an open-source tool designed to orchestrate AI coding agents into repeatable, long-running workflows. It allows developers to define complex coding processes once and then execute them reliably, automating repetitive tasks and enabling multi-agent collaboration.

✅ Send anywhere (local networks or continents)
✅ Peer-to-peer direct transfer (no cloud)
✅ End-to-end encryption (QUIC + TLS 1.3)
✅ No accounts or personal info required
✅ Transfer anything (any size, any format)
✅ Resumable transfers
✅ Fast & reliable
✅ NAT traversal via QUIC (hole punching)
✅ CLI integration
✅ Free & open source

AltSendme is a free, open-source, and privacy-focused tool for direct peer-to-peer file transfers. It enables users to send any file or folder of any size across the globe without relying on cloud storage, ensuring end-to-end encryption and no account requirements.
